title: Modeled Field Interface Library
text: Modeled Field Interface Library A Modeled Field Syntax Library contains Modeled Field Layouts that can be used during development when defining fields. Characteristics Characteristics Object type code: finlib Main Development Object? Yes Part of: — Contains: Property , Modeled Field Interface Generalization: Main Development Object , Library Specializations: — Compilation Output: — URI format: finlib:LIB Specialization The Modeled Field Interface Library specializes Main Development Object and Typed Library in the following ways: It can only contain Modeled Field Interfaces as child development objects. It has a fixed name of LIB . It is automatically created when the first Modeled Field Interface is created. Was this topic helpful? Like Dislike
